name: @quereus/plugin-loader
description: Plugin loading system for Quereus - supports dynamic imports for Node.js and browsers

scripts.//test: NOTE: test/config-channel.spec.ts covers the plugin config channel only; url parsing/validation, npm-spec resolution, and CDN url building are still untested — this is core infrastructure, so that gap is tracked as debt, not shrugged off: see tickets/backlog/debt-plugin-loader-test-coverage.md. --passWithNoTests stays so an empty glob (or a future test-file rename) doesn't fail the build.
